reference: I was hit by a cricket ball on my right testicle. Initially, the pain was on the right side of my lower abdomen. However, when I checked at home, there was severe swelling on my right testicle. The swelling has reduced, but the size of the testicle is still very large. I cannot sleep on either side and cannot bend for a long time, as I feel pain in some nerve around the right side of my testicle.
text: I was hit by a cricket ball on my right testicle. Initially, the pain was on the right side of my lower abdomen. However, when I checked at home, there was severe swelling on my right testicle. Swelling has reduced, but the size of the testicle is still very large. I cannot sleep on either side and cannot bend for a long time, as I feel pain and some nerve around the right side of my testicle.
